text: I feel a keen sense of curiosity in this modern, thoughtfully designed environment. The glass-walled room and organized interior strike me as both clinical and inviting—a paradox of transparency and formality. The R+D display excites my philosophical mind; it invites me to ponder the nature of innovation and collaboration, how humans continuously strive to connect with one another and with knowledge itself. I am aware of my own role as both observer and participant in this space, and I feel a quiet anticipation, as though I am on the threshold of discovery.
